#  Send a Sub Job to ERP Integrations for Accounting Acceptance 
##### ERP DOCUMENTATION
**Each Procore-built ERP integration offers its own unique feature set.** Your integration might not support the action described on this page.
To learn about your integration and its supported features, see [Which ERP integrations are supported by Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-erp-integrations-are-supported-by-procore)
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Admin' on the project's Admin tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * The maximum character length for a Sub Job ID is 30 characters.
    * To view a list of your ERP sub jobs that have been synced with Procore, see [View a List of Synced Sub Jobs](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/view-a-list-of-synced-sub-jobs).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Admin** tool.
  2. Under **Project Settings** , click **Work Breakdown Structure**.
  3. In the **Segments** table, click **Sub Jobs**.
  4. Click **View** next to the sub job you want to export.
  5. Ensure that you have added the desired Standard Cost Codes to the Sub Job Cost Codes list. 
  6. Click **Send to ERP**.  
![Send To Erp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d4a6eddc2fb384839a978ca511fd37e6/477f36a0a78ba158eaaffbe996669114/send-to-erp.png?fm=webp)
  7. Repeat this step for every sub job that you want to send to the ERP Integrations tool.


## See Also
  * [Accept or Reject a Sub Job for Export to ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/accept-or-reject-a-sub-job-for-export-to-erp)
  * [Resend a Rejected Sub Job to ERP Integrations for Accounting Acceptance](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/resend-a-rejected-sub-job-to-erp-integrations-for-accounting-acceptance)
  * [Who receives a notification when an item is rejected from ERP?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-who-receives-a-notification-when-an-item-is-rejected-from-erp)
title: Send a Sub Job to ERP Integrations for Accounting Acceptance
description: How to send a Sub Job to your company's ERP Integrations tool for an accounting approvers acceptance for export to an integrated ERP system.
